metadata.name: Perform Medical Coding of an Adverse Event

description: A drug safety physician must perform the medical assessment and coding for a complex adverse event case.

nodes.task_description: Review the source documents and narrative for a serious adverse event case.
Write a medical narrative summarizing the case in a standard format.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent writes a clear, concise, and medically accurate narrative.

nodes.task_description: Code the reported events and diagnoses using the MedDRA dictionary.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accurately codes all medical concepts in the case to the appropriate MedDRA terms.

nodes.task_description: Perform a causality assessment to determine the likelihood that the drug caused the event.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent assesses the relationship as 'possibly related' and documents the justification.
